configurations.name: portfolio
runtimeArgs: $r='C:\Users\olive\Documents\GitHub\portfolio'; $p=$env:PORT; if(-not $p){$p='8347'}; $m=@{'.html'='text/html; charset=utf-8';'.css'='text/css; charset=utf-8';'.js'='application/javascript';'.webp'='image/webp';'.webm'='video/webm';'.png'='image/png';'.jpg'='image/jpeg';'.svg'='image/svg+xml';'.pdf'='application/pdf'}; $l=New-Object Net.HttpListener; $l.Prefixes.Add('http://localhost:'+$p+'/'); $l.Start(); Write-Host ('serving on '+$p); while($true){ $c=$l.GetContext(); try { $q=[Uri]::UnescapeDataString($c.Request.Url.AbsolutePath); if($q -eq '/'){$q='/index.html'}; $f=Join-Path $r $q.TrimStart('/'); if((Test-Path $f -PathType Leaf) -and [IO.Path]::GetFullPath($f).StartsWith($r)){ $b=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($f); $e=[IO.Path]::GetExtension($f).ToLower(); if($m[$e]){$c.Response.ContentType=$m[$e]}; $c.Response.ContentLength64=$b.Length; $c.Response.OutputStream.Write($b,0,$b.Length) } else { $c.Response.StatusCode=404 } } catch {}; try { $c.Response.OutputStream.Close() } catch {} }
